title: Record: 10L Mixed Precision: val_bpb=1.2147 (10 layers + int6 middle layers)
author: nanlliu

data.scope: middle layers 3-6 int6; first/last 3 layers int8

data.description: Increased the Transformer depth from 9 layers to 10 layers.

novel_contributions: Mixed-precision compression using int8 for early/late layers and int6 for middle layers to fit under the 16MB limit.
Increased model depth from 9 to 10 transformer layers while staying within the artifact budget.
Lowered learning rates substantially from the default settings to improve post-quantization validation performance.
Demonstrated multi-seed robustness with all five seeds beating the prior benchmark and achieving p < 0.001.
